items.title: At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire, Thai media report
items.summary: Unverified footage shows flames blasting out of the bar as people flee.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people, officials say
items.summary: Footage shared online by first responders shows a huge blaze raging and plumes coming out of the front door of the pub in the northern part of the Thai capital.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Live Updates: Cease-Fire Unraveling as U.S. and Iran Trade Strikes Again
items.summary: A fresh round of attacks by the U.S. on Sunday was the latest volley in a familiar pattern of back-and-forth strikes fueled by disputes over the Strait of Hormuz.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.
